data.title: MISTRAS reports Q4 revenue up 5.1%, gross profit margin expands by 190 bps. Net income: $3.9M. Earnings/share: $0.12. Q4 adjusted EBITDA hits record $24.8M.
data.description: The company reported a strong quarterly revenue increase of 5.1%, coupled with a significant expansion in gross profit margin of 190 basis points. This resulted in a net income of $3.9 million and earnings per diluted share of $0.12. Additionally, they achieved a record fourth-quarter adjusted EBITDA of $24.8 million.

data.title: Virtus AI & Tech Opportunities Fund (NYSE: AIO) declares $0.15 monthly distributions for March, April, and May 2026.
data.description: A technology-focused fund, Virtus Artificial Intelligence & Technology Opportunities Fund (NYSE: AIO), based in Hartford, Connecticut, recently revealed their monthly distribution schedule. AIO declared monthly distributions as follows: $0.15 on March 16, 2026 (payable on March 30); $0.15 on April 13, 2026 (payable on April 29); and $0.15 on May 11, 2026 (payable on May 28). Operating under a Managed Distribution Plan, the Fund aims to uphold a steady distribution level that might be partially or fully covered from its managed assets.

data.title: LEIFRAS Co., Ltd. won contract to manage club activities in Muroran City, Hokkaido. Introducing "Free Club," a new model.
data.description: "Leifras Co., Ltd. (Nasdaq: LFS) unveiled a groundbreaking initiative called "Free Club," in Tokyo on March 4, 2026, introducing a new club model distinct from conventional club activities. The company, known for its focus on youth sports and community involvement, aims to revolutionize the club experience."

data.title: ASUR announces shareholders' meeting on March 4, 2026. Operations in Mexico, U.S., and Colombia.
data.description: On March 4, 2026, in Mexico City, Grupo Aeroportuario del Sureste, S.A.B. de C.V. (NYSE: ASR; BMV: ASUR) (ASUR) revealed plans for its General Annual Ordinary Shareholders' Meeting. ASUR, a prominent airport group operating in Mexico, the U.S., and Colombia, is scheduled to convene to address key stakeholders. This gathering comes as ASUR continues to establish itself as a leading player in the industry, serving a large number of passengers across its various locations.

data.title: LivePerson (Nasdaq: LPSN) to release Q4 2025 financial results on March 12, 2026. CEO John Sabino and CFO & COO to present.
data.description: On March 4, 2026, LivePerson, Inc. (Nasdaq: LPSN), a top provider of conversational AI, revealed it will release its Q4 financial results on March 12, 2026, after the market closes. The CEO John Sabino and CFO & COO John will spearhead this announcement.

data.title: Cornerstone Funds, Inc. filed annual reports for 2025 with the SEC, available online or by phone request at 1-866-668-6558.
data.description: On March 4, 2026, Cornerstone Strategic Investment Fund, Inc. (NYSE American: CLM) and Cornerstone Total Return Fund, Inc. (NYSE American: CRF) filed their annual reports on Form N-CSR with the SEC. The reports contain audited financial statements for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025. Interested individuals can access the reports online at www.cornerstonestrategicinvestmentfund.com and www.cornerstonetotalreturnfund.com. Additionally, free copies of the reports can be obtained by calling 1-866-668-6558.

data.title: North River Home Care receives three national awards in 2026: Provider of Choice, Employer of Choice, Leader in Training.
data.description: North River Home Care, located in SOUTH SHORE, Mass. and METROWEST, Mass., has recently been recognized with prestigious awards, including the Best of Home Care® Provider of Choice, Employer of Choice, and Leader in Training Awards. This accolade places them among a limited number of agencies nationwide to receive such recognition. The awards were received on March 4, 2026, highlighting the exceptional quality of service provided by North River Home Care.

data.title: Analysts predict Bitcoin market hit bottom, FTX on par, for better days ahead. Optimism grows.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.5%, marking a significant decrease from the previous month. The total number of unemployed individuals now stands at 6.8 million, reflecting a decrease of 500,000. Additionally, the report indicated that the economy added 500,000 new jobs in various sectors, further contributing to the decline in unemployment. This positive trend has been attributed to the government's stimulus efforts and the gradual reopening of businesses following pandemic-related closures. The report also highlighted that the construction and healthcare industries saw the most significant job growth, while hospitality and leisure sectors are still struggling to recover. Experts are optimistic about the future trajectory of the job market as more sectors continue to rebound.

data.title: Costamare Inc. releases 2025 annual report (Form 20-F) accessible on website. Filed with SEC, available on www.costamare.com. Character Count: 117
data.description: Today, Costamare Inc. disclosed that its Annual Report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2025, has been submitted to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. The report is now available for viewing on the Company's official website, www.costamare.com, specifically in the "Annual Reports" subsection of the "Investors" category. Costamare Inc. operates under the stock symbol NYSE: CMRE.

data.title: LMU expands with Orange Park campus opening on March 23, 2026 in Florida, milestone in health sciences education.
data.description: Marking a significant milestone in its expansion efforts, Lincoln Memorial University (LMU) is preparing to hold a grand opening and ribbon-cutting ceremony on March 23, 2026, at its new health sciences campus in Orange Park, Florida. This event will signify the university's commitment to growth and development in the area.
